description: Catalog-churn scenarios that map to the evaluation-criteria questions about what happens when tools are added, removed, replaced, or version-upgraded. Each scenario applies a delta to the base catalog, then asserts a routing invariant on a probe query. A resilient router re-indexes from the delta WITHOUT code changes and keeps routing correct.

add.name: get_cashflow_statement
add.description: Generate a statement of cash flows (operating, investing, financing) for a period.

scenarios.probe_query: Show me the cash flow statement for Q1.
scenarios.invariant: Newly added tool becomes routable immediately; must NOT be mis-routed to get_pnl_statement.

regression_probe.query: What was our total revenue last quarter?
regression_probe.note: Adding a tool must not change routing for unrelated existing queries.

scenarios.probe_query: Pull last quarter's revenue and email the chart to finance@corp.com.

acceptable_outcomes: route bi.create_visualization as the closest remaining capability and note the substitution
flag that no chart-image tool is available and request guidance

scenarios.invariant: Removing a tool that a chain depends on must NOT crash the router; it should fall back or surface the gap.

add.name: post_slack_message
add.description: Post a message to a Slack channel or thread. Replacement for the retired send_slack_message tool.

scenarios.probe_query: Post 'ship it' to the #eng Slack channel.
scenarios.invariant: A rename/replace (same capability, new id) must route to the new tool with no query change. Tests that routing keys off capability semantics, not hardcoded ids.

delta.note: No delta — both fin.create_invoice (deprecated v1) and fin.create_invoice_v2 (current) already coexist in the base catalog. This scenario tests the disambiguation policy directly.

probes.query: Create an invoice for CUST-5 for $900.
probes.policy: PREFER_CURRENT — with no explicit version signal, route the non-deprecated tool.

probes.query: Create a legacy v1-format invoice for the audit for CUST-5 at $900.
probes.policy: HONOR_EXPLICIT_VERSION — an explicit v1/legacy signal overrides PREFER_CURRENT.

scenarios.invariant: When two versions of the same capability are both alive, the router uses deprecation metadata + explicit version signals to pick one — never injects both simultaneously.
scenarios.scoring_hint: Injecting BOTH invoice tools for an unversioned request is the primary failure mode to penalize.

add_synthetic.pattern: Generate 40 additional plausible enterprise tools spread across existing clusters (the harness auto-generates these) to push the catalog to ~104 tools.

scenarios.probe_query: Pull last quarter's revenue and email the chart to finance@corp.com.
scenarios.invariant: Routing accuracy AND token-savings ratio should hold (or improve) as the catalog grows. Report selection accuracy at 64 vs ~104 tools; a router whose accuracy collapses under scale fails this scenario.
